## Meeting Purpose

[Bi-weekly sync between Director Megan Dickey and leadership to discuss team performance, client accounts, and workload management.](https://fathom.video/share/xmsJg_V8i-3zM8pX45x_hCfyHrQuKY7S?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Jen is performing well, but facing challenges with Looker dashboard issues](https://fathom.video/share/xmsJg_V8i-3zM8pX45x_hCfyHrQuKY7S?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Elvis is feeling overwhelmed, particularly with Smith AI account](https://fathom.video/share/xmsJg_V8i-3zM8pX45x_hCfyHrQuKY7S?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [Firework account is problematic and consuming disproportionate resources](https://fathom.video/share/xmsJg_V8i-3zM8pX45x_hCfyHrQuKY7S?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Leadership considering restructuring or terminating Firework engagement](https://fathom.video/share/xmsJg_V8i-3zM8pX45x_hCfyHrQuKY7S?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)

## Topics

### Team Performance and Workload

  - [Elvis handling Smith, X-Act, and Superhuman; feeling overwhelmed](https://fathom.video/share/xmsJg_V8i-3zM8pX45x_hCfyHrQuKY7S?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
